rationale: Review 2's single-unit finding is the only scope-grounded issue (PR mixes plausible Layer-0 AffineAlgGroup/AlgPoints with unverifiable Layer-5/6 placeholders that have no proximate extension path in the diff), so acting on it yields a cleanly scoped foundations PR; Review 1's bundling demand is an ungrounded design change that would alter the PR's explicit math definition without scope benefit.
